settings.heading: Employee of the Month & Year Awards
settings.subheading: Recognise standout employees with branded Employee of the Month and Year awards — crystal, metal and acrylic, engraved with the winner and your logo. Reorderable, GST-invoiced. By Meru Trophy.
settings.breadcrumb_label: Employee of the Month / Year Award
settings.schema_name: Employee of the Month / Year Award
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Employee of the Month/Year awards recognise standout performers with branded crystal, metal or acrylic pieces engraved with the winner's name and your logo — from around ₹600, reorderable monthly. Meru Trophy keeps your design on file. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: A recurring Employee of the Month/Year award keeps recognition visible all year. Pick a branded design, and we keep it on file so you can reorder each month with the new winner engraved. Pair the monthly award with a premium annual Employee of the Year piece. See our full recognition program.

settings.title: Monthly + annual
settings.text: Recurring monthly award plus a premium annual piece.

settings.title: Branded & engraved
settings.text: Winner's name and your logo on every award.

settings.title: Reorder on demand
settings.text: Design kept on file for quick monthly reorders.

settings.title: Any material
settings.text: Crystal, metal or acrylic to fit your budget.

settings.question: Can we reorder the same award each month?
settings.answer: Yes — we keep your design on file so you only send the new winner's name.

settings.question: Should the annual award be bigger?
settings.answer: Usually yes — a premium Employee of the Year piece stands apart from the monthly award.

settings.question: Is our logo included?
settings.answer: Yes — engraved or printed on every award.

settings.question: Do you provide GST invoices?
settings.answer: Yes — GST invoices and PO handling; see our recognition program.

settings.heading: Planning employee recognition?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
